subcodes.first_line: A remembrance sent down by the Lord of the Throne and of earth. Blessed is he who heareth and saith: "Praise be unto Thee, O Lord of the Kingdom of Names!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر انزله مالک العرش و الثری طوبی لمن سمع و قال لک الحمد یا مالک ملکوت الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for service
